Interface JDACProperty<T>

All Superinterfaces:
SpecificProperty<T>
All Known Implementing Classes:
JDACEnumerationProperty, JDACMappingProperty, JDACSingletonProperty
public interface JDACProperty<T> extends SpecificProperty<T>

A JDACProperty is an identifier for a certain component of a JDA-Commands.

A JDA-Commands component is just some sort of arbitrary information. That could be some service like MessageResolver, some setting configured by the user via a builder (like JDACBuilder.localizeCommands(boolean)), a custom implementation of an interface (like Instantiator) or something else.

There are basically 3 types of properties:

  • Singleton for values consisting of one instance
  • Enumeration for values consisting of multiple instances (reference to Collection)
  • Mapping for values representing a mapping between keys and values (reference to Map)

Beside their purpose, each type hold a slightly different set of information, but they share some common values: - a unique name - a scope to which this property is bound - a source, from which the values of this property can be retrieved.

See Also:
  • JDACIntrospection
  • Property
  • SpecificProperty

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final Collection<JDACProperty<?>>
    BUILDER
    A collection consisting of all Propertys that are settable by the user through JDACBuilder
    static final JDACProperty<Collection<ClassFinder>>
    CLASS_FINDER
     
    static final JDACProperty<Definitions>
    DEFINITIONS
    The Definitions instance available after fully starting the framework.
    static final JDACProperty<Descriptor>
    DESCRIPTOR
     
    static final JDACProperty<Consumer<EmbedConfig>>
    EMBED_CONFIG
     
    static final JDACProperty<Collection<EmbedDataSource>>
    EMBED_SOURCES

    EMOJI_RESOLVER
    The EmojiResolver service provided by JDA-Commands.
    static final JDACProperty<Collection<EmojiSource>>
    EMOJI_SOURCES

    ERROR_MESSAGE_FACTORY
     
    static final JDACProperty<ExpirationStrategy>
    EXPIRATION_STRATEGY
     
    static final Collection<JDACProperty<?>>
    EXTENSION
    A collection consisting of all Propertys that are settable by the user and loadable through extensions
    static final JDACProperty<Map<Class<? extends Extension.Data>, Extension.Data>>
    EXTENSION_DATA
     
    static final JDACProperty<ExtensionFilter>
    EXTENSION_FILTER
     
    static final JDACProperty<CommandDefinition.CommandConfig>
    GLOBAL_COMMAND_CONFIG
     
    static final JDACProperty<InteractionDefinition.ReplyConfig>
    GLOBAL_REPLY_CONFIG
     
    static final JDACProperty<GuildScopeProvider>
    GUILD_SCOPE_PROVIDER
     
    static final JDACProperty<I18n>
    I18N
    The I18n service provided by JDA-Commands.
    static final JDACProperty<Instantiator>
    INSTANTIATOR
     
    static final JDACProperty<JDACIntrospection>
    INTROSPECTION
    The JDACIntrospection instance itself used to retrieve properties in this scope.
    static final JDACProperty<InvocationContext<?>>
    INVOCATION_CONTEXT
    The InvocationContext of this interaction.
    static final JDACProperty<JDA>
    JDA
    The JDA instance bound to this specific Runtime.
    static final JDACProperty<JDACommands>
    JDA_COMMANDS
    The JDACommands instance available after fully starting the framework.
    static final JDACProperty<GenericInteractionCreateEvent>
    JDA_EVENT
    The GenericInteractionCreateEvent of this interaction.
    static final JDACProperty<KeyValueStore>
    KEY_VALUE_STORE
    The KeyValueStore associated with this runtime.
    static final JDACProperty<LocalizationFunction>
    LOCALIZATION_FUNCTION
    The LocalizationFunction backed by MessageResolver used to localize/resolve commands and descriptions.
    static final JDACProperty<Boolean>
    LOCALIZE_COMMANDS
     
    static final JDACProperty<Localizer>
    LOCALIZER
     
    static final JDACProperty<ClassFinder>
    MERGED_CLASS_FINDER
    An ClassFinder instance that is backed by all ClassFinder of CLASS_FINDER.
    static final JDACProperty<MessageResolver>
    MESSAGE_RESOLVER
    The MessageResolver service provided byt JDA-Commands.

    MIDDLEWARE
    MIDDLEWARE property holds multiple Middlewares associated with their Priority
    static final JDACProperty<Collection<String>>
    PACKAGES
     
    static final JDACProperty<PermissionsProvider>
    PERMISSION_PROVIDER
     
    static final JDACProperty<PlaceholderResolver>
    PLACEHOLDER_RESOLVER
    The PlaceholderResolver service provided by JDA-Commands.
    static final Collection<JDACProperty<?>>
    PROVIDED
    A collection consisting of all Propertys that are provided by JDA-Commands

    RUNTIME_ID
    The identifier bound to this runtime.
    static final JDACProperty<Boolean>
    SHUTDOWN_JDA

    The TYPE_ADAPTER property maps AdapterTypes containing the source and targets Types to their associated TypeAdapter
    static final JDACProperty<Map<Class<? extends Annotation>, Validator<?,?>>>
    VALIDATOR
    The VALIDATOR property maps a Validator to its identifying annotation.

  • Method Summary

    Methods inherited from interface SpecificProperty

    generalized, scopedGet

  • Field Details

    • CLASS_FINDER

      @PropertyInformation(scope=CONFIGURATION, source=EXTENSION, fallbackBehaviour=IGNORE) static final JDACProperty<Collection<ClassFinder>> CLASS_FINDER
      See Also:
      • JDACBuilder.classFinders(ClassFinder...)

    • EMOJI_SOURCES

      @PropertyInformation(scope=CONFIGURATION, source=EXTENSION, fallbackBehaviour=IGNORE) static final JDACProperty<Collection<EmojiSource>> EMOJI_SOURCES
      See Also:
      • JDACBuilder.emojiSource(EmojiSource...)

    • EMBED_SOURCES

      @PropertyInformation(scope=CONFIGURATION, source=EXTENSION, fallbackBehaviour=COMBINE) static final JDACProperty<Collection<EmbedDataSource>> EMBED_SOURCES
      See Also:
      • EmbedConfig.sources(EmbedDataSource...)

    • DESCRIPTOR

      @PropertyInformation(scope=CONFIGURATION, source=EXTENSION) static final JDACProperty<Descriptor> DESCRIPTOR
      See Also:
      • JDACBuilder.descriptor(Descriptor)

    • LOCALIZER

      @PropertyInformation(scope=CONFIGURATION, source=EXTENSION) static final JDACProperty<Localizer> LOCALIZER
      See Also:
      • JDACBuilder.localizer(Localizer)

    • INSTANTIATOR

      @PropertyInformation(scope=CONFIGURATION, source=EXTENSION) static final JDACProperty<Instantiator> INSTANTIATOR
      See Also:
      • JDACBuilder.instantiator(Instantiator)

    • MIDDLEWARE

      @PropertyInformation(scope=CONFIGURATION, source=EXTENSION, fallbackBehaviour=COMBINE) static final JDACProperty<Collection<Map.Entry<Priority, Middleware>>> MIDDLEWARE
      MIDDLEWARE property holds multiple Middlewares associated with their Priority
      See Also:
      • JDACBuilder.middleware(Priority, Middleware)

    • TYPE_ADAPTER

      @PropertyInformation(scope=CONFIGURATION, source=EXTENSION, fallbackBehaviour=COMBINE) static final JDACProperty<Map<AdapterType<?,?>, TypeAdapter<?,?>>> TYPE_ADAPTER
      The TYPE_ADAPTER property maps AdapterTypes containing the source and targets Types to their associated TypeAdapter
      See Also:
      • JDACBuilder.adapter(Class, Class, TypeAdapter)

    • VALIDATOR

      @PropertyInformation(scope=CONFIGURATION, source=EXTENSION, fallbackBehaviour=COMBINE) static final JDACProperty<Map<Class<? extends Annotation>, Validator<?,?>>> VALIDATOR
      The VALIDATOR property maps a Validator to its identifying annotation.
      See Also:
      • JDACBuilder.validator(Class, Validator)

    • PERMISSION_PROVIDER

      @PropertyInformation(scope=CONFIGURATION, source=EXTENSION) static final JDACProperty<PermissionsProvider> PERMISSION_PROVIDER
      See Also:
      • JDACBuilder.permissionsProvider(PermissionsProvider)

    • ERROR_MESSAGE_FACTORY

      @PropertyInformation(scope=CONFIGURATION, source=EXTENSION) static final JDACProperty<ErrorMessageFactory> ERROR_MESSAGE_FACTORY
      See Also:
      • JDACBuilder.errorMessageFactory(ErrorMessageFactory)

    • GUILD_SCOPE_PROVIDER

      @PropertyInformation(scope=CONFIGURATION, source=EXTENSION) static final JDACProperty<GuildScopeProvider> GUILD_SCOPE_PROVIDER
      See Also:
      • JDACBuilder.guildScopeProvider(GuildScopeProvider)

      @PropertyInformation(scope=CONFIGURATION, source=EXTENSION, fallbackBehaviour=COMBINE) static final JDACProperty<Collection<Resolver<String>>> STRING_RESOLVER
      See Also:
      • JDACBuilder.stringResolver(Resolver...)

      See Also:
      • JDACBuilder.globalCommandConfig(CommandDefinition.CommandConfig)

      @PropertyInformation(scope=CONFIGURATION, source=BUILDER) static final JDACProperty<InteractionDefinition.ReplyConfig> GLOBAL_REPLY_CONFIG
      See Also:
      • JDACBuilder.globalReplyConfig(InteractionDefinition.ReplyConfig)

    • PACKAGES

      @PropertyInformation(scope=CONFIGURATION, source=BUILDER, fallbackBehaviour=COMBINE) static final JDACProperty<Collection<String>> PACKAGES
      See Also:
      • JDACBuilder.packages(String...)

    • EXPIRATION_STRATEGY

      @PropertyInformation(scope=CONFIGURATION, source=BUILDER) static final JDACProperty<ExpirationStrategy> EXPIRATION_STRATEGY
      See Also:
      • JDACBuilder.expirationStrategy(ExpirationStrategy)

    • LOCALIZE_COMMANDS

      @PropertyInformation(scope=CONFIGURATION, source=BUILDER) static final JDACProperty<Boolean> LOCALIZE_COMMANDS
      See Also:
      • JDACBuilder.localizeCommands(boolean)

    • SHUTDOWN_JDA

      @PropertyInformation(scope=CONFIGURATION, source=BUILDER) static final JDACProperty<Boolean> SHUTDOWN_JDA
      See Also:
      • JDACBuilder.shutdownJDA(boolean)

    • EXTENSION_DATA

      @PropertyInformation(scope=CONFIGURATION, source=BUILDER, fallbackBehaviour=COMBINE) static final JDACProperty<Map<Class<? extends Extension.Data>, Extension.Data>> EXTENSION_DATA
      See Also:
      • JDACBuilder.extensionData(Extension.Data...)

    • EXTENSION_FILTER

      @PropertyInformation(scope=CONFIGURATION, source=BUILDER) static final JDACProperty<ExtensionFilter> EXTENSION_FILTER
      See Also:
      • JDACBuilder.filterExtensions(ExtensionFilter.FilterStrategy, String...)

    • EMBED_CONFIG

      @PropertyInformation(scope=CONFIGURATION, source=BUILDER) static final JDACProperty<Consumer<EmbedConfig>> EMBED_CONFIG
      See Also:
      • JDACBuilder.embeds(Consumer)

    • INTROSPECTION

      @PropertyInformation(scope=CONFIGURATION, source=PROVIDED) static final JDACProperty<JDACIntrospection> INTROSPECTION
      The JDACIntrospection instance itself used to retrieve properties in this scope.

    • I18N

      @PropertyInformation(scope=CONFIGURATION, source=PROVIDED) static final JDACProperty<I18n> I18N
      The I18n service provided by JDA-Commands. Needs the values of DESCRIPTOR and LOCALIZER.
      Implementation Note:
      the JDACPropertyProvider for this value is defined in the constructor of JDACBuilder

    • MESSAGE_RESOLVER

      @PropertyInformation(scope=CONFIGURATION, source=PROVIDED) static final JDACProperty<MessageResolver> MESSAGE_RESOLVER
      The MessageResolver service provided byt JDA-Commands. Needs the values of I18N and EMOJI_RESOLVER.
      Implementation Note:
      the JDACPropertyProvider for this value is defined in the constructor of JDACBuilder

    • EMOJI_RESOLVER

      @PropertyInformation(scope=CONFIGURATION, source=PROVIDED) static final JDACProperty<EmojiResolver> EMOJI_RESOLVER
      The EmojiResolver service provided by JDA-Commands. Needs the value of EMOJI_RESOLVER.
      Implementation Note:
      the JDACPropertyProvider for this value is defined in the constructor of JDACBuilder

    • PLACEHOLDER_RESOLVER

      @PropertyInformation(scope=CONFIGURATION, source=PROVIDED) static final JDACProperty<PlaceholderResolver> PLACEHOLDER_RESOLVER
      The PlaceholderResolver service provided by JDA-Commands.
      Implementation Note:
      the JDACPropertyProvider for this value is defined in the constructor of JDACBuilder

    • MERGED_CLASS_FINDER

      @PropertyInformation(scope=CONFIGURATION, source=PROVIDED) static final JDACProperty<ClassFinder> MERGED_CLASS_FINDER
      An ClassFinder instance that is backed by all ClassFinder of CLASS_FINDER. It will search in all registered ClassFinder for the requested class.
      Implementation Note:
      the JDACPropertyProvider for this value is defined in the constructor of JDACBuilder

    • JDA_COMMANDS

      @PropertyInformation(scope=INITIALIZED, source=PROVIDED) static final JDACProperty<JDACommands> JDA_COMMANDS
      The JDACommands instance available after fully starting the framework.

    • DEFINITIONS

      @PropertyInformation(scope=INITIALIZED, source=PROVIDED) static final JDACProperty<Definitions> DEFINITIONS
      The Definitions instance available after fully starting the framework.

    • LOCALIZATION_FUNCTION

      @PropertyInformation(scope=INITIALIZED, source=PROVIDED) static final JDACProperty<LocalizationFunction> LOCALIZATION_FUNCTION
      The LocalizationFunction backed by MessageResolver used to localize/resolve commands and descriptions.
      See Also:
      • LocalizationFunction

    • JDA

      @PropertyInformation(scope=RUNTIME, source=PROVIDED) static final JDACProperty<JDA> JDA
      The JDA instance bound to this specific Runtime.

    • RUNTIME_ID

      @PropertyInformation(scope=RUNTIME, source=PROVIDED) static final JDACProperty<String> RUNTIME_ID
      The identifier bound to this runtime. Same as Event.runtimeId().

    • KEY_VALUE_STORE

      @PropertyInformation(scope=RUNTIME, source=PROVIDED) static final JDACProperty<KeyValueStore> KEY_VALUE_STORE
      The KeyValueStore associated with this runtime. Same as InvocationContext.keyValueStore() or Event.kv().

    • JDA_EVENT

      @PropertyInformation(scope=PREPARATION, source=PROVIDED) static final JDACProperty<GenericInteractionCreateEvent> JDA_EVENT
      The GenericInteractionCreateEvent of this interaction. Same as Event.jdaEvent().

    • INVOCATION_CONTEXT

      @PropertyInformation(scope=INTERACTION, source=PROVIDED) static final JDACProperty<InvocationContext<?>> INVOCATION_CONTEXT
      The InvocationContext of this interaction. Same as in Middleware.accept(InvocationContext).

    • EXTENSION

      static final Collection<JDACProperty<?>> EXTENSION
      A collection consisting of all Propertys that are settable by the user and loadable through extensions
      See Also:
      • Property.Source.EXTENSION

    • BUILDER

      static final Collection<JDACProperty<?>> BUILDER
      A collection consisting of all Propertys that are settable by the user through JDACBuilder
      See Also:
      • Property.Source.BUILDER

    • PROVIDED

      static final Collection<JDACProperty<?>> PROVIDED
      A collection consisting of all Propertys that are provided by JDA-Commands
      See Also:
      • Property.Source.PROVIDED
